The '''Garyn Raiders''' was a criminal organization based on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] before and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The organization was founded by ex-[[Vigo/Legends|Vigos]] of [[Alexi Garyn]],<ref name="CDAG" /> the [[Underlord]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]],<ref name="DM" /> who managed to avoid the [[Mission to Ralltiir|destruction]] of Garyn's organization by the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]],<ref name="CDAG" /> in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].<ref name="DM" /> The Garyn Raiders had remained fiercely loyal to their leader over the years and had banded together on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of Rori to base their operations.<ref name="CDAG" />

During the Galactic Civil War, they mainly directed their operations at [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] troops in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]], whom they harassed to avenge their fallen leader.<ref name="CDAG" /> They were also in open conflict with the [[First Brigade|Restuss Brigade]].<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref> By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Garyn Raiders were based in a [[Garyn Raider's Bunker|bunker]] located a short distance northwest of the city of [[Narmle (city)|Narmle]].<ref name="SWG:GRB" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] criminal [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] attempted to recruit some of the Garyn Raiders to supply muscle for break-ins into some of the larger [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] labs on Rori and Naboo. However, the amount of money he offered was ridiculous to them and they refused to work for him. The [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] later attacked a [[Garyn Raider Base|base]] of the Garyn Raiders and forced them to reveal everything they knew about Ponda Baba.<ref name="SWG:RHM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Right Handless Man|Rori}}</ref>
